fail_conditions: B04 launch surface is treated as whole-stack implementation.
Router or lobe ratification is attempted before the ordered sequence is satisfied.
A civilization component enters Canonical without schema, validator, receipt, and rollback.
Any Gate D work widens externality, commercial scope, or external comparative claims.
terminal_rule: Binding the B04 activation launch surface opens only the lawful civilization ratification lane. It does not implement the full stack or authorize anything outside the bounded Gate D postures.
